surface_verification.justification: Shared-infra logic change (resolve_churn_conflicts + integrate_main git-I/O encoding + commit-failure handling) — no startable app surface. The touches_io_boundary triage.jsonl encoding round-trip is empirically pinned by a byte-level round-trip probe (Step 3.8, two probes across CJK/em-dash/smart-quote/accented/Cyrillic/emoji-ZWJ/astral-4byte/BOM, zero findings) AND a non-UTF-8 loud-fail regression test; full shared suite 3147 passed.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 (F22): a non-ASCII triage.jsonl conflict unions BYTE-IDENTICAL through _union_conflict — strict UTF-8 decode (no cp1252 mojibake/crash), both sides preserved verbatim
behaviors.evidence: test_resolve_churn_conflicts.py::test_triage_conflict_unions_non_ascii_byte_identical PASSED (RED before fix: cp1252 reader-thread UnicodeDecodeError 0x81 -> None.splitlines AttributeError; asserts exact line-by-line UTF-8 bytes + raw payload bytes on disk) + empirical Step-3.8 probe (7 edge cases, byte-identical)

behaviors.behavior: AC1b (F22 hardening): a genuinely-corrupt non-UTF-8 byte in a legacy triage.jsonl fails LOUDLY with a structured triage_invalid status + merge abort, never a bare traceback, never silent mojibake
behaviors.evidence: test_resolve_churn_conflicts.py::test_triage_conflict_non_utf8_byte_returns_triage_invalid_not_traceback PASSED (raw 0x81 byte stage -> _TriageNotUtf8Error -> triage_invalid, exit 4, merge aborted) + Step-3.8 probe 2b (0x9D)

behaviors.behavior: AC2 (F17): a blocked merge commit (pre-commit hook rejection -> CalledProcessError) returns a STRUCTURED JSON status (merge_commit_failed) and leaves NO MERGE_HEAD (git merge --abort), with abort-double-fault distinguished as merge_commit_failed_abort_incomplete
behaviors.evidence: test_integrate_main.py::test_integrate_returns_json_and_aborts_when_merge_commit_blocked + ::test_main_cli_reports_merge_commit_failed_status PASSED (RED before fix: CalledProcessError escaped integrate(); CLI test asserts no Traceback in stderr + MERGE_HEAD gone + exit 7)

behaviors.behavior: AC3 no regression across the churn/integrate path (events/triage reconcile, allowlist gate, --ours/--theirs, campaign-status S3, follow-up Run-ID commit)
behaviors.evidence: full shared/tests suite 3147 passed (not slow/cross_plugin); churn+integrate+campaign-status+churn_merge subset 52 passed; ruff@0.15.15 clean; anti-ratchet exit 0
